title: 1,000+ Tokens/Sec: Google Just Shattered the AI Speed Limit (DiffusionGemma)
summary: Google DeepMind released DiffusionGemma, a text generation model that applies image-generation diffusion techniques to text using uniform state diffusion for iterative refinement. The model achieves theoretical speeds exceeding 1,000 tokens per second on H100 GPUs by shifting from memory-bound to compute-bound execution through bidirectional attention and multi-pass token correction.
writeup: The video covers DiffusionGemma, a Google DeepMind text generation model that adapts image-generation diffusion methods to text through uniform state diffusion, refining output iteratively rather than producing tokens left to right. It matters because the approach reframes generation as compute-bound instead of memory-bound, with theoretical throughput exceeding 1,000 tokens per second on H100 GPUs. The key mechanisms are bidirectional attention and multi-pass token correction, which together enable the iterative refinement that drives the speed gains.
